cases.resolvedText: IdP certificate mismatch between Salesforce and the AWS Identity Provider for the Contact Center Connected App broke Omni-Channel/Voice login for ~200 agents; updating the Connected App with the new IdP certificate and replacing the AWS IdP metadata resolved the issue; CIC disengaged after customer confirmed fix in staging and production.

AutoThrottle (memoryHost) triggered on sandbox org AUS36S due to heavy Apex usage; no critical business impact confirmed by customer; CIC disengaged citing throttle limited to sandbox with no active production impact.

Apex CPU time limit exceeded on Email-to-Case inbound processing during time-critical GDPR (DSGVO) compliance case handling; customer requested a temporary 36-hour emergency limit increase; support reviewed sync/async limit-increase options and customer went to capture debug logs internally; CIC disengaged as customer investigates on their end.

cases.account: ADITYA BIRLA FINANCIAL SHARED SERVICES LIMITED
cases.resolvedText: Amazon AppFlow failing to handle OAuth refresh-token rotation (invalid_grant errors) caused session terminations blocking Salesforce data fetch; at least 3 other related cases identified (474054548, 474054414, 474053598) suggesting a multi-customer pattern; customer confirmed resolved on their end pending an RCA on why the refresh token was revoked; CIC disengaged.

Post-deployment issue left agents unable to access the Knowledge Hub (3 users impacted, with risk of scope growing as business hours ramped up); customer identified and applied a URL-parameter workaround and confirmed the issue was resolved; CIC disengaged.

MFI org (scheduled for Hyperforce migration to Hyderabad the following night) hit a functionality issue during sandbox regression testing ahead of cutover; customer confirmed the issue was resolved after review; CIC disengaged.

SSO Issuer/IDP mismatch broke FSMA mobile login (persistent white-screen on auth) for a large subset of 1099 contractor field installers; customer identified and fixed the SSO configuration on their end and validated with users; CIC monitored overnight and disengaged after ~2 hours with no further customer response.
